parameters.name: group
parameters.label: Group
parameters.description: If there are input groups, specifying a group name in this field will cause this to act only upon the group specified. Accepts patterns, as described in .

parameters.name: surftype
parameters.label: Connectivity
parameters.description: This option is used to select the type of surface, when using a Mesh Type.

parameters.name: polys
parameters.label: Convert Mesh to Polygons
parameters.description: Changes the output mesh to consist of individual polygons.

parameters.name: imperfect
parameters.label: Imperfect
parameters.description: Applies to splines only. If selected, the results are approximated nonrational curves, otherwise they are perfect rational curves.

parameters.name: type
parameters.label: Revolve Type
parameters.description: Determines how the revolve should be generated.

parameters.name: divs
parameters.label: Divisions
parameters.description: Density of the resulting mesh surface.

parameters.name: order
parameters.label: Order
parameters.description: If a spline type is selected, it is built at this order.

parameters.name: cap
parameters.label: End Caps
parameters.description: If selected, it adds faceted end caps.

parameters.name: dirz
parameters.label: Dirz
parameters.description: X, Y, and Z coordinates of the direction vector defining the direction of the revolve.

parameters.name: endangle
parameters.label: Endangle
parameters.description: The start and end angles of the revolve. A revolve will start at the beginning angle, and proceed towards the ending angle. If Beginning = 0 and End = 360 it will be fully revolved. Values greater tha

parameters.name: originz
parameters.label: Originz
parameters.description: Coordinates defining the origin of the revolution.
